title: Longfield Solar Farm: post-consent agreement amendment, Town and Country Planning Act 1990
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State in accordance with section 106A of the Town and Country Planning Act 1990 to approve a Deed of Variation between Longfield Solar Energy Farm Limited and various parties including relevant local planning authorities. The Deed of Variation varies the existing Deed of Development Consent Obligations and Other Covenants which was signed by the same parties in connection with The Longfield Solar Farm Development Consent Order 2023 under the Planning Act 2008.  Date of decision  10 October 2025  Company/location   Longfield Solar Energy Farm LimitedLand located to the north-east of Chelmsford, Essex   Type of project / consent requested  Solar farm / Post-consent agreement amendment under the Town and Country Planning Act 1990. "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
